#e<hide>f hex color is (<hide>, <hide>, <hide>) in RGB color palette. Closest web safe color is #cc<hide>.
#e<hide>f hex code consists of <hide> red value, <hide> green and <hide> blue. In HSL notation it has <hide>.<hide> hue, <hide>.<hide> saturation and <hide>.<hide> lightness. The process color (CMYK) is combination of <hide> cyan, <hide> magenta, <hide> yellow and <hide> key (black).
Shades are created by adding a black color. The lightest one in this statement is #d<hide>, whereas #<hide> is the darkest.
Tints are formed by combining with white color. The brightest one of the following tints is #ffffff, and the darkest is #ef<hide>b<hide>.
